key_drivers: US-Iran military conflict escalating: VIX +18% to 25.28, gold surging to $5,400+, oil supply disruption risk

BoJ hawkish pivot (0.75%, hiking path signaled) + risk-off environment = strong JPY case
AUD crushed by China PMI contraction (49.3 Jan, 49.1 Feb forecast), risk-off, and falling copper (-4.36% 1-month)
Credit spreads widening (HY OAS 3.12%, up from 2.7% lows) and MOVE rising (+20.56% 1-month): headwinds for equities
